# vm\_context

```go
import "github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/vm/vm_context"
```

Package vm\_context provides the per\-block execution context handed to embedded\-contract methods.

### Overview

A vm\_context exposes read access to the current chain state, the momentum being produced, the account block under execution, the configured plasma budget, and the helpers that contracts use to emit descendant sends. It is the only API surface a contract sees during execution.

Per\-package documentation is being filled in incrementally. See docs/STYLE.md for the full template applied in subsequent PRs.

<a name="AccountVmContext"></a>
## type [AccountVmContext](<https://github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/blob/master/vm/vm_context/interfaces.go#L12-L38>)



```go
type AccountVmContext interface {
    api.PillarReader
    store.Account
    MomentumStore() store.Momentum

    GetFrontierMomentum() (*nom.Momentum, error)
    GetGenesisMomentum() *nom.Momentum

    Save()
    Reset()
    Done()

    AddBalance(ts *types.ZenonTokenStandard, amount *big.Int)
    SubBalance(ts *types.ZenonTokenStandard, amount *big.Int)

    IsAcceleratorSporkEnforced() bool
    IsHtlcSporkEnforced() bool
    IsBridgeAndLiquiditySporkEnforced() bool
}
```
